title: policyResolvers.ts:53 — both branches return 'async' (likely typo)
body:
While integrating the KNYT rep/rewards/tasks workstream against the spine, noticed services/access/policyResolvers.ts line 53:

return hint ? 'async' : 'async';

Both ternary branches return the same value. Looks like the intent was probably 'async-batched' on one side. Not a blocker for our workstream — the receipt mode is 'sync' for consequential actions and 'async' otherwise, both of which work end-to-end. Filing this as the spine team's call rather than touching a canonical file ourselves (CLAUDE.md ban on modifying services/access/* without operator approval).

Decisions doc context: codexes/packs/agentiq/updates/2026-05-10_knyt-rep-rewards-tasks-decisions.md section 3.
